def: One who furnishes outfits for a voyage, a journey, or abusiness.
A pick with two prongs, to pry with.
Having the skin adhering closely and rigidly to the flesh;hidebound. Skinbound disease. (Med.) See Sclerema neonatorum, underSclerema.
The quality of being greedy; vehement and selfish desire.Fox in stealth, wolf in greediness. Shak.
A formal recital or exposition of facts; exposure, orrevelation, of something which some one wished to keep concealed.
The thin epithelium lining the blood vessels, lymphatics, andserous cavities. See Epithelium.
A French money of account, afterward a silver coin equal to 20sous. It is not now in use, having been superseded by the franc.
